message:
ci: Use local Playwright binary for browser install

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/o3ae9nkokzxuzhdg927433dq

files.patch:
@@ -35,7 +35,8 @@ jobs:
         run: bun test
 
       - name: Install Playwright browsers
-        run: bunx playwright install --with-deps chromium chromium-headless-shell
+        run: ./node_modules/.bin/playwright install --with-deps chromium chromium-headless-shell
+        working-directory: ./packages/e2e
 
       - name: Run E2E tests
         run: bun run test:e2e
